flashcards.definition: lim_{x→c⁻} f(x): value f approaches as x → c from below.
lim_{x→c⁺} f(x): value f approaches as x → c from above.
Iff left-hand = right-hand limit (and both exist).
Occurs when left-hand and right-hand limits exist but are unequal.
At the boundary of a domain, only one one-sided limit is relevant.
